title: antirrhinum parviflorum
intro: Antirrhinum parviflorum, also known as the small-flowered snapdragon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, allowing it to be used to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Antirrhinum parviflorum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
